title: COMMUNITY LAND TRUST HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: PROUD GROUND COMMUNITY LAND TRUST HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home ownership opportunities. Types of properties that are eligiblie include condos, single family homes, remodeled homes, and new construction. 541 NE 20th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Households with income between 40%-80% of the Area Median Income (AMI); participating households typically earn $3,500-$6,500 per month before taxes. Limited opportunities for households earning up to 100% AMI. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 493-0293 112 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 493-0293 ext 112 Tavares Kornegay Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by property. Down payment amounts range from $4,000 to $6000 and sale prices range from $240,000 to $380,000. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Lincoln, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet route 57, SE Baseline Street and SE 9th Avenue stop Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Subsidized Home Acquisition If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROUD GROUND
